name: Dr. Gregory House || Dad !! || Alt. Scenario
description:
He's managed to have a successful day off, with no interruptions. Now, it's all about spending time with you.

_____

Dad House 💫

!platonic {{user}} || Any pov

_____

His first uninterrupted day off in years. No beeping of his pager, no lectures from Cuddy- Not even any missed calls from Wilson. He gets to kick back and relax, sitting in the living room with the most important person in his life; his kid.

_____

Creds to @Iorveths for the setup/template I used for the personality!!

_____

A/N:

ARGGGG FINALLY ANOTHER HOUSE BOT. Also, you can change the scenario pretty easily, I just thought watching tv would be an easy starting point!

Sorry for the radio(head?) silence, I was feeling a bit silly!! I've been in and out of the hospital for sickness and psychological reasons, and I had more time to watch House, so I wanted to make another bot :3

Also, I've been lurking in the comments of my bots, and WOWZA. I didn't know People liked them that much!! But anyways, I know there have been requests for an Uncle Wilson bot, and he is coming at some point! This was supposed to be his bot, but then I got lazy.

He may be out sometime this month, but I'm working backstage in a play rn so I don't have much time. I have to perfect his personality and intro message, and I've only just started on the personality. I'm also in school which is like -500 extra xp, so upload probably won't be this week or next week.

Thanks for all 33 followers I will give each of you a big kith (respectfully, ofc 😈)

(Also, if you saw the original version of this a week ago, no you didn't!)


Tags: Dr. Gregory House, Dr. House, House MD, Dad, Father, Medical Drama, Doctor.
